description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per Notion database. Uses the Search API to enumerate databases the integration has access to. StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an asset queries the database and returns rows (with flattened property values) as a DataFrame.

access_token_env_var.label: Access Token Env Var
access_token_env_var.description: Env var with a Notion internal-integration token.

database_selector.label: Database Selector
database_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector matching against database titles.

page_size.label: Page Size
page_size.description: Records per query page (Notion caps at 100).
